Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand the requirements clearly The user has provided a loan application process with strict normative rules and some desiderata recommended but not strict

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process must follow the exact order Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Any deviation here is a violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Looking at Case 1 Let me check the timestamps Application Received at 900 Credit Check at 930 within 30 minutes which is fine Then Risk Assessment at 1000 Loan Decision at 1100 Approved Inform Applicant at 1300 Finalize Documentation at 1330 and Close Case at 1400 All steps are in order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The timing for Credit Check is within 24 hours even within 30 minutes which is good The Inform Applicant was at 1300 which is 2 hours after the decision The desiderata mention informing within 48 hours so this is within that window

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Also theres a Follow up Call mentioned as a desideratum but Case 1 doesnt have one Wait the event log for Case 3 mentions no Follow up Call but Case 1s log doesnt list it either Hmm maybe the Follow up Call is optional so not having it isnt a violation but a desideratum

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So Case 1 seems to comply with all normative rules

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 The events start with Application Received then Risk Assessment at 820 without a prior Credit Check Thats a clear violation of the normative rule that Credit Check must come before Risk Assessment Then Credit Check happens at 830 which is after the Risk Assessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also after the Loan Decision Rejected at 930 theres a Finalize Documentation step at 1000 which is not allowed because if rejected you shouldnt finalize documentation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So two violations here incorrect order Risk before Credit and finalizing documentation after rejection

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Application Received on 112 900 then Credit Check on 114 1000 Thats over 24 hours about 49 hours which violates the desideratum of completing Credit Check within 24 hours Then Risk Assessment and Loan Decision follow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Inform Applicant is on 116 1500 which is 3 days after the decision Loan Decision was on 114 1200 The desideratum says inform within 48 hours so this is a violation of the desiderata

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also theres no Follow up Call mentioned which is a desideratum So Case 3 has two desiderata violations but no normative violations because all steps are in order

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now for the desiderata analysis Case 3 has Credit Check delayed beyond 24 hours Inform Applicant after 48 hours and no Follow up Call Case 1s Inform Applicant was within 48 hours 2 hours after decision and no Follow up Call But since the Follow up Call is a desideratum missing it isnt a norm violation Case 2s main issues are normative

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Possible justifications For Case 2 maybe the system had an error or data entry mistake where Risk Assessment was logged before Credit Check The Finalize Documentation after rejection might be a misunderstanding of the rules thinking that some post decision steps are required even if rejected

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For Case 3 the delays could be due to high volume or system issues but theyre not norm violations since the steps are in order The missing Follow up Call might be an oversight but not critical
